![][image1]

# **Creator Accelerator**

# **Backbone Doc**

| VISION | Why are you here? |
| :---- | :---- |
| Current problems | STUCK at level 2 of online money for too long\! Flip flopping between offers/business models. Switched from content coaching, to affiliate, to B2C, back to B2B, then shut it down for low ticket. Once again finally switching back to the core. B2B content coaching. April $40k target missed entirely. Close to NO new rev brought in during April. Fulfillment bottleneck. Only 7 posts were made in April. NO MARKETING. Net worth / income level are still too low for the lifestyle that I truly want. Net worth \~$35k. Net income \~$10k/mo. Discipline/habits/sleep/consistency/focus problems. |
| Current income | \~$15-20k/mo |
| Consequences | If I stay on current trajectory: “Young founder” positioning window closes at 27\. I have 3 years left. Peer gap with Soowei/Ava/Bennett becomes uncloseable. They keep compounding while I keep resetting. $4.8M left on the table. $100k/mo vs. $20k/mo. That’s quite literally generational wealth that I’m missing out on for my wife and children. That’s a huge difference in lifestyle. Every “what do you do” at dinner becomes a reminder of the gap between who I am and who I could have been. I will end up “pretty good” instead of EXCEPTIONAL. |
| Desired situation  | Locked in on ONE offer for the next 18 months. NO flip flopping. Hundreds of clients in a scalable program. Not a measly 5-7 handheld clients. Team running fulfillment, sales, ops stuff. I work on content and vision only\! 4-5 content pieces shipping every week no excuses Income converting into assets. Investments. Properties. $200k net worth MINIMUM by end of year. |
| Desired income | $50k/mo by July. $100k/mo by end of year. |
| Mission | Help as many creators as I can to print and capitalize off the amazing opportunity we have right now with social media and online money. To blow up. And then act like I don’t know nobody.Become the best version of myself. Start a family. Provide for family. |

| PROOF | What have you achieved for yourself or others? (tip: include images) |
| :---- | :---- |
| Proof 1 | Albert |
| Proof 2  | Ayden |
| Proof 3 | Myself and my own account |
| Image | Alex Eubank, Prasad, Cole, Cynthia, Seth Capehart |

| NICHE | Who you serve and what they want? |
| :---- | :---- |
| Who you serve | Established $10-40k/mo creators who want to scale their personal brand and organic revenue. |
| Current situation | They’re good at what they do (Trading, Amazon FBA, ads agency, etc.). They just don’t have the organic content/info business knowledge & systems to scale to their desired level. |
| Problems | Stuck in 200 view jail No organic revenue Ad costs rising / over reliant on ads Don’t have editors Inconsistent with content, burnt out No clear brand direction No content strategy |
| Desires | Get to 10k followers Increase organic revenue by \+$10k/mo |
| Who don’t you serve  | Complete beginners. Or anyone who I feel might just dispute like Moises did. Basically just anyone who’s broke or under like $10k/mo. |

| PREMIUM OFFER | What do you offer your niche? |
| :---- | :---- |
| Outcome | We will add \+$10k/mo to your business from organic revenue guaranteed or your money back. (stipulations) We will get you to 10k followers in 90 days or add 10k followers to your existing follower count in 90 days. |
| Price | $6,000 for 3 months. |
| Unique mechanism | We cracked a method for AI content scraping/research that has been proven to hit consistently without fail. All you have to do is execute. We give you WEEKLY ideas and our research method is probably best in the game right now for viral content. You’re not going to find a better price to value ratio anywhere else in the content coaching / agency space. I invite you to go ahead and try tho\! |
| Deliverables | 90 day cohort 1-1 onboarding call 3x/week group calls for more 1-1 support DFY weekly content ideas DFY Editor placement Month 1 – account warmup \+ viral momentum Month 2 – Launch sequence, $$$ Month 3 – Scaling help, fulfillment systems |
| Name | Creator Accelerator |
| Guarantee | \+$12k CC money back guarantee. (with stipulations) Basically if you don’t double your investment with us, it’s free. Absolute worst case scenario, you get free service and you get to keep all the knowledge and systems we give you. |
| Scarcity/Urgency | Only 10 spots for this upcoming launch. That’s real scarcity. I only have capacity for a cohort of 10 because I want to be very involved in each client’s success. |

| BACKSTORY | How did you get to where you are now? |
| :---- | :---- |
| Past situation | Hit a low point in college. Looked around and realized everyone was sleepwalking — following the script, settling for average.Refused to follow that path. I dropped out and went all in on online business. No advantages. No family money, no connections. Started from $0. Spent $30k+ on education. Got burned by scammy courses. Every failure taught me what NOT to do. |
| Past pains | I felt broke, I felt invisible, I felt like a nobody. I felt like if I didn’t change things, my life would be average, maybe even struggling. And I didn’t want to struggle my whole life. I wanted more out of life. I just didn’t have the knowledge and systems yet, but I had the mindset. |
| Past desires | I wanted an audience, I wanted a way to monetize my passion. I wanted TIME & LOCATION freedom\! I wanted to get paid to exist\!\! |
| Epiphany | Invested in real mentorship from people already where I wanted to be. That’s when it clicked. Hit my first $10k/mo and never looked back. |
| Current situation  | $10k/mo MRR, 173k IG, 9k YT. Lean lifestyle business. Now launching high-ticket coaching ($4k) with April cohort. Installing DM setting system to convert existing audience. The business I’m growing IS the proof. Self-fulfilling flywheel. |
